title: Redis basics
text: Redis is an in-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, and message broker.

title: Search with TF-IDF
text: TF-IDF ranks documents based on term frequency and inverse document frequency.

title: Python and Redis
text: redis-py is the Python client for Redis. It supports pipelines and Lua scripting.

title: Vector search
text: Vector search uses embeddings to compare semantic similarity between documents.
